svg.title: Spreadsheet-Native Payments

g.text: The payment sheet stages transaction details in-sheet, with the guided create-and-commit flow centered and the legacy inspector kept as compatibility context only.

svg.text: The dominant table keeps invoice review visible while payment inputs stage in the adjacent step card.
Invoice selection and payment prep can happen in-sheet, but posting remains a separate confirm step.
The right-side card mirrors the current invoice-to-payment flow: review invoice, stage details, preview impact, then explicitly record through the guided create path.
Spreadsheet edits stage the payment only. The financial transaction posts when Record Payment is clicked, and the guided create path stays primary.
Operators keep quick audit context in view without losing the staged transaction they are preparing.
History and allocation trace stay visible for trust and audit context, not as a replacement for the explicit commit step.
The support band keeps receipt intent, reference requirements, guided-commit primacy, allocation trace, and legacy compatibility visible during payment entry.
This sheet may open from /accounting/payments or from the accounting workspace tab, but the guided commit surface remains the design center.

g.text: Selected INV-2207 · Arrow keys move stage steps · Cmd/Ctrl+Enter records only from confirm step
Edits stage the payment. Guided commit stays centered and the legacy inspector is compatibility-only.
